calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2010 Continued To Nov-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bosco Credit LLC.
No appearance by defendant Dean Alac, a/k/a Alac Dean.
Default was entered against defendant on April 26, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 27, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up was filed on July 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bosco Credit LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dean Alac, a/k/a Alac Dean, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $479,020.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $65,826.64.
Attorney Fees - $550.00.
Late Charges - $435.00.
Costs - $1,085.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $546,916.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Continued To Oct-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2010 Continued To Aug-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
